overall.description: A large black bird flies through a misty mountain canyon and emerging valleys in what appears to be game engine footage. The camera follows closely behind as the bird navigates from a narrow river gorge into open rocky terrain and meadows, with heavy fog and diffused lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty river canyon with steep rocky walls

events.description: bird banks sharply to the left to navigate the canyon curve
canyon walls begin to recede as the valley opens slightly ahead

agents.ego_description: large bird of prey flying steadily through the narrow canyon, following the river's path with occasional banking maneuvers

entered.detail: dark flowing river visible through the mist at the bottom of the canyon
steep rocky cliffs rising on both sides of the canyon, partially obscured by fog
evergreen trees clinging to the canyon walls and cliff edges
thick volumetric fog filling the canyon and reducing visibility

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a large black bird flying through a narrow, fog-filled canyon. Steep rocky walls rise on both sides with pine trees clinging to the cliffs, while a river flows below. The bird executes a sharp bank to navigate the canyon's curve as the mist swirls around the terrain.

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into a wider valley with more open sky visible
bird banks right while maintaining altitude over the widening terrain

agents.ego_description: bird continues flight as the terrain opens up, revealing wider landscape views and distant hills

entered.detail: scattered rock formations emerging from the hillside on the right
fog-shrouded mountain peaks visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The bird emerges from the narrow canyon into a wider valley where the terrain opens up. The river continues below but the steep walls have receded, replaced by scattered rocky outcrops and forested hills in the distance. The mist persists, creating a layered atmospheric perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forested hills with scattered pine trees

events.description: bird banks left around a large rock formation while descending slightly
terrain becomes more rugged with large boulders and scattered vegetation

agents.ego_description: bird navigates through rocky terrain and scattered pine trees, adjusting flight path around obstacles

entered.detail: massive boulders and rocky outcrops dotting the hillside
green grassy hills replacing the river canyon below

segments.scene_description: Flying over rocky hillsides, the bird leaves the river behind and navigates through scattered pine trees and large rock formations. The ground below transitions from water to grassy terrain interspersed with boulders, while the bird makes banking maneuvers to avoid obstacles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with scattered trees and distant hills

events.description: bird slows slightly and descends toward the meadow while maintaining steady glide

agents.ego_description: bird glides over open meadow, maintaining steady flight above the grassy terrain toward distant forest

entered.detail: gentle grassy hills extending into the foggy distance
dense tree line visible on the horizon through the mist

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the bird flying over an open meadow with rolling hills extending into the foggy distance. Large rock formations give way to grassy terrain with scattered trees, as the bird maintains a steady glide path through the misty atmosphere toward denser forest ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement behind a large black bird as it navigates from a claustrophobic, fog-filled canyon into an expansive, misty meadow. It begins with the bird banking sharply through a narrow gorge where steep rocky walls and clinging pine trees tower over a flowing river. As the bird emerges from the canyon, the terrain opens into a wider valley where the steep cliffs recede into distant forested hills and layered atmospheric mist. The scene then shifts away from the river, gliding over rocky hillsides and boulders that gradually transition into grassy terrain. Finally, the landscape expands into an open meadow of rolling hills and scattered trees, with the bird maintaining a steady glide toward a dense forest in the foggy distance.
